content.en:
Obtaining three copies of Thunder Source Liquid at one time is equivalent to three copies of eternal resources, and if other first-class invincible people know about it, they will definitely be envious.

These three parts of Thunder Source Liquid alone were enough to make many first-class invincible people fight desperately.

Of course, for Ye Tian, three parts of Thunder Source Liquid were still not enough, and he was still short of six parts of Eternal Resources.

"There may be other eternal resources in Longze, but it has already angered the Thunder Source Ancient Dragon, so I still don't go to Longze!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to choose one of the other forbidden places.

After choosing for a long time, Ye Tiancai chose it.

"Let's go to the Ancient Realm of Stars!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Star Ancient Domain is a special forbidden land, which is very famous in the entire Source Sea, and it is also a forbidden place that is imprisoned.

The creatures of the Xingchen Ancient Domain can't get out, which is equivalent to being bound, but there is a powerful race living in the Xingchen Ancient Domain-the Ancient Star Clan!

The Gu Xing Clan has a unique talent in physical cultivation, but the soul talent is a little worse.

But even so, Gu Xingchen still has many supreme beings.

In the case of being bound to the Xingchen Ancient Domain, the Ancient Star Clan was still able to give birth to the Supreme One, which shows that the Xingchen Ancient Domain definitely has a lot of eternal resources.

And it is true that many invincibles have broken into the Star Ancient Domain and snatched eternal resources, but many more invincibles have fallen in the Star Ancient Domain.

With Ye Tian's understanding of the Star Ancient Domain, the Supreme of the Ancient Star Clan was not very powerful, after all, they were bound to a forbidden land, and many resources were lacking, and it was already very good to be able to cultivate to the Supreme Realm, and it was difficult to ascend to the Supreme Realm.

If the Supreme One from the outside world could enter the Star Ancient Domain, he would naturally be able to sweep through the Star Ancient Domain, but it was a pity that the Supreme One couldn't enter it, and even an existence like the Void Source Ancestor couldn't enter the Star Ancient Domain.

When Ye Tian told the machine spirit that he was going to enter the Xingchen Ancient Domain, the machine spirit advised: "Master, the Xingchen Ancient Domain is very mysterious, the previous master has studied the Xingchen Ancient Domain for a period of time, and even sent people to the Xingchen Ancient Domain, and there are some gains. The Ancient Realm of Stars should be an even more ancient and powerful being who has arranged a mysterious prohibition to allow the Supreme One to enter, perhaps that one has already surpassed the Supreme Realm. And the Star Ancient Domain has a heritage inside, which is certain, but only the Ancient Star Clan is allowed to enter. It was precisely because of the existence of that inheritance that the Ancient Star Clan was so powerful. Otherwise, how could such a small area give birth to the Supreme in a mere forbidden land? The master has a special clone, and he is not afraid of falling, so when the time comes, he can spy on the inheritance of the Ancient Star Clan, and maybe he will be able to get a great opportunity!"

"It depends!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

-------------------

The Ancient Realm of the Stars.

It is like a transparent world surrounded by the source sea, and any invincible person can enter the Xingchen Ancient Domain from all over the place, provided that it can break the barrier of the Xingchen Ancient Domain, and without the strength of the second-class invincible, it is impossible to break this barrier, and if you want to come out, the second-class invincible is not necessarily enough, and the first-class invincible is safe.

Therefore, only the top second-class invincibles and first-class invincibles dared to enter the Star Ancient Domain.

Ye Tian's copy body came here, picked a position at random, and immediately slammed into the barrier of the Star Ancient Domain.

Tear and pull!

The barrier of the Star Ancient Domain was torn apart, and Ye Tian stepped into it in an instant.

Then, Ye Tian urged a secret treasure to pierce through the void at an extremely fast speed and leave, far away from this area of the Star Ancient Domain, otherwise when the powerhouse of the Ancient Star Clan arrived, he would be besieged by the powerhouse of the Ancient Star Clan.

At the same time, inside a large hall of the Ancient Star Clan.

A ten-foot tall Ancient Star Clan opened his eyes, and his gaze seemed to look through layers of void to somewhere in the outside world.

"There's another outsider coming in, and they're really hungry!!"

The Ancient Star Clan said angrily.

He was an ancestor of the Ancient Star Clan, that is, the Supreme Rank.

Wow!

He hurried to the place where Ye Tian came in, but when he arrived here, he couldn't see Ye Tian's shadow.

It's normal, every time.

However, once an outsider reveals his whereabouts and is tracked down by the powerhouses of the Ancient Star Clan, they will besiege and kill the other party as soon as possible.

......

"The environment of the Star Ancient Domain is a bit similar to the starry sky environment, there are even stars here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, these stars are not ordinary stars, each star is incomparably large, containing terrifying power, and each star is rich in minerals and resources, and its value is no less than that of a barren exotic world.

Ye Tian sensed the rules of the Star Ancient Domain, and wanted to know why so many eternal resources were born here, but no matter how he probed, he didn't gain anything.

No matter how you look at it, it seems to be very ordinary!

"Almost all the eternal resources are in the hands of the Ancient Star Clan, and if you want to snatch the Eternal Resources, you can only snatch them from the hands of the Ancient Star Clan!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It is very difficult to snatch eternal resources from the hands of the Ancient Star Clan, but why are there so many first-class invincible people who want to enter the Star Ancient Domain to snatch the eternal resources of the Ancient Star Clan, are they looking for death?

No, it's because the benefits are too great.

Once it succeeds once, the eternal resources that will be snatched will not be one or two, but many.

Most of the eternal resources are indeed preserved in the ancestral land of the Ancient Star Clan, but the Ancient Star Clan is similar to the outside forces, and it is not monolithic, and there is also competition here, divided into force organizations.

Therefore, some small forces also have eternal resources, and if a small force is destroyed, it is possible to obtain some eternal resources.

Similarly, Ye Tian also wanted to find a small force of the Ancient Star Clan, so as to destroy the other party and obtain their eternal resources.

Soon, Ye Tian descended near a star and used his copying talent to probe the situation of this star.

Airplanes!

The copying talent shrouded the entire star, and the talent of countless ancient star clans was detected by Ye Tian.

"Huh!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He unexpectedly discovered that many of the Ancient Star Clan actually possessed an Ultimate Ancestral Fu called the Ancient Star Body, which was obviously a physical talent, and it was estimated that it was also the reason why the Ancient Star Clan was so outstanding in physical body cultivation.

Ye Tian immediately copied these Ancient Astral Talents, and if he absorbed enough Ancient Astral Talents, he could fuse them into an Eternal Ancestor.

Ye Tian does not lack the Eternal Ancestral Endowment, but it does not mean that the Eternal Ancestral Endowment is not needed, maybe there will be unexpected benefits if it is fused into an ancient star at the level of the Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

Immediately, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to find eternal resources, and first copied these ancient astral talents.

He planned to copy and fuse a total of two ancient astral bodies into two ancient astral eternal ancestral endowments, one for his own body and one for the copy body.

He was going to copy the body of an Ancient Star Clan, and by the way, he would bestow the Ancient Star Eternal Ancestor on the other party.

Of course, this is a matter of preparation in the later stage, prepared to spy on the secrets of the ancient star clan.
